response:
TEMPERATURE IS THE MEASURE OF HEAT IN A SYSTEM.
SUNSHINE SHINES SO BRIGHTLY ON THE SKY.
STARS SPARKLE IN THE DARK NIGHT SKIES.
SNOW STOPS THE STRONG WINDS FROM SWEEPING.
SEAS SURGE WITH SALT AND SPOIL THE SHORES.
SILK SWIRLS SO SOFTLY IN THE STILL AIR.
SPEECH SAYS SO MANY THINGS TO US.
SMILES SHOW SO MUCH JOY IN OUR SOULS.
STORMS SWEPT THE STREETS WITH SO MUCH SNOW.
SAND STICKS TO OUR FEET ON THE SEASHORE.
SUNSETS SEEM SO SWEET TO OUR EYES.
ROLL THE DICE FOR FUN AND GAMES.
SOMETHING SPECIAL HAPPENS WHEN WE STAY SAFE.
